title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.1 - Fix: Encore and Swing crashed on play (missing power var); both work now. Joke now inverts a random invertible debuff. Enjoy the Ride wording clarified. Requires BaseLib.
